raw_input.title: Desarrollador Python Senior
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Remote Python developer building product using AI. Develop services and microservices in Python, support frontend with Vue, CI/CD. Key tools: Python, Django, PostgreSQL, Vue, microservices, Kubernetes.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer with 4+ years, remote-friendly, product delivery, APIs and practical AI tooling interest.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: remote Python/Django/PostgreSQL role is aligned with the profile.
